name: @galerinaa/ext-bridge-cpp
description: Native CPU/GPU execution bridges (BitNet ternary) implementing the Tower InferenceBridge contract — simulator fallback, native addon seam
note: Stage A: governed bridge + simulator fallback + real hardware detection. Stage B: compile ggml-bitnet (C:/wwwprojects/BitNet, MIT) into a native N-API addon via cmake-js — see native/README.md.
